$schema._description: Upcoming version livestream per game. Update once a livestream is announced (typically ~10 days before next patch).

_fields.title: Optional version theme/name (e.g. 'Luna III')
_fields.date: ISO datetime YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ssZ. Use 12:00:00Z (UTC noon) if unknown — most livestreams air at 12:30 UTC.
_fields.highlights: Array of 1-4 short strings teasing what's expected (new characters, regions, etc.). Optional.

_scrape_hints: Each game's Version pages list the Special Program / livestream date once announced.
If the next version has no announced livestream yet, set this entry to null (e.g. "gi": null).
Date may be tentative until HoYoverse confirms officially.
